atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to insert Tailwind's default base styles, component classes, and utility classes into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use @apply to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the @layer directive to tell Tailwind which "bucket" a set of custom styles should belong to.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the @config directive to specify which config file Tailwind should use when compiling.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use @custom-variant to register a custom variant in Tailwind CSS.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use @theme to define theme values that can be used in your Tailwind config.
